title: [codereview-pass3] P2: populate_routes assumes IPv6 IID in bytes 8-15; valid for link-local but not all prefixes
description: Edge case for GUA/ULA without standard IID. Low impact. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-fy9q
close_reason: Updated populate_routes to detect Yggdrasil-style GUA addresses (0x02 prefix with trailing zeros) and extract NodeId from bytes 1..9 without bitflip; standard path for link-local/ULA/GUA uses bytes 8..16 with ^=0x02 on first byte. Tests and clippy pass for lichen-rpl. 3 codereview passes completed with beads filed for related findings in routing, addr, and gateway. No comments added.
